rows.label: tlk4730016802_msg0001
rows.name:
Hey! I was just moved
by the wonderful school
we managed to build here!

rows.label: tlk4730016802_msg0002
rows.name:
Fixing leaks and reinforcing
walls with the kids... those
were treasured moments!

rows.label: tlk4730016802_msg0003
rows.name:
Oof! I almost forgot, we've got new
faces now, don't we? Looks like
it's time for an extension then!
